commit.message:
test(web): adopt jest-dom + migrate components/ presence assertions (#1029)

## Summary
- Unban `@testing-library/jest-dom` (history-only ban, see #586 / #906 /
#909 — no technical reason) and register via `/vitest` subpath in
`vitest.setup.ts`.
- Add scoped `no-restricted-syntax` counter-lint in `tests/unit/**` that
keeps `.toHaveClass` / `.toHaveStyle` /
`.toHaveAttribute('class'|'style', ...)` banned (per web/CLAUDE.md
class-string rule). All other jest-dom matchers are available.
Playwright's own `.toHaveClass` in `tests/e2e/` is unaffected (scope is
`tests/unit/**`, not `tests/**`).
- Migrate 148 zero-ambiguity inline-query presence assertions across 14
`tests/unit/components/` files. Pure 1:1 matcher swap — net line change
is 0. Variable-reference forms and non-DOM assertions
(`parseERMPCard(...).toBeNull()`, `localStorage.getItem(...)`,
`img.getAttribute(...)`) were intentionally untouched.

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm lint` green.
- [x] `pnpm test:unit` delta vs clean main = **0 new failures**. Both
runs report 11 files / 114 tests failing on the same pre-existing
`localStorage.clear is not a function` issue (onboardingProgress,
openclaw-pending-sync, firebase, LoginForm beforeEach, etc.) — unrelated
to this PR and worth a separate investigation.
- [x] 13/14 migrated files pass individually; the 14th (LoginForm) fails
only on the pre-existing `localStorage.clear` line (109 — untouched by
this diff).
- [ ] CI `code-quality / lint-and-test` green.
- [ ] Spot-check a couple of migrated specs in the diff — every change
should be one of the four transforms listed in the commit body.

## Follow-up (not blocking)
- Remaining `const el = getByTestId(...); expect(el).toBeDefined()`
variable-reference forms in the same 14 files (~30–40 sites) left for a
follow-up PR — they need per-site type tracing.
- `hooks/` (33/34 DOM-rendering files) and `app/` (29/50) are the next
two natural batches; `lib/` + `utils/` have ~0 DOM sites and do not
benefit from this migration.
- Pre-existing `localStorage.clear is not a function` on main — looks
like a shared root cause across 11 spec files; not this PR.

commit.message:
refactor(web): T2-a-2 globalBridge helper 再 7 处 + 回应 #1036 review (#1040)

## Summary

**#1036 review followup**(Claude 非阻塞观察):
- `setupBridge` 的 `env: 'ios' | 'android'` union 是 latent footgun
- helper 总 stub `window.WebViewJavascriptBridge`(Android bridge),传
`'ios'` 会让 user-agent flag 和 bridge stub 不一致
- 修复:restrict `env: 'android'` + JSDoc 说明 iOS path 因不同
global(`WKWebViewJavascriptBridge` / `WKWVJBCallbacks` /
`webkit.messageHandlers`)保留 inline setup

**再替换 7 处** Android inline setup:
- isBridgeAvailable > return true after init(makeFakeBridge 无 handler)
- globalBridge > direct call when ready
- openCamera > throws synchronously
- getStatusBarHeight > returns null(Android)
- getStatusBarHeight > invalid JSON(Android)
- globalBridge without callback
- getStatusBarHeight outer catch throws

**刻意保留** 3 处 inline Android setup(特殊 semantics):
- `initBridge Android > bridge available`:断言
`expect(bridge).toBe(fakeBridge)` 需要访问 helper 内部 fakeBridge 引用
- `auto-init setTimeout` 2 个 test:stub `setTimeout` spy / 不调
`waitForBridge` 以测 setTimeout 路径,setupBridge 内部调 waitForBridge 会改变语义

## 重复率变化

- **tests: 7.36% → 7.20%**(288 → 283 clones,-5 clones,-70 duplicate
lines)
- globalBridge spec 累计从 25 处样板压到 3 处,余下 3 处因 semantics 不 helper 化
- 距离目标 6% 剩 1.20%,后续 T2-b(useSSEStream 18 处)+ T2-c(useLiteLLMApi 13 处)继续

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test:unit tests/unit/utils/globalBridge.unit.spec.ts` 47/47
全绿
- [x] `pnpm lint` 通过
- [x] `pnpm dup:tests` 本地:7.36% → 7.20%
- [ ] CI `code-quality / lint-and-test` 绿,Web Duplication
Summary(tests)显示 7.20%

commit.message:
feat(web): migrate tracking to gtag and add page_view event (#1033)

## Summary
- **New `tracking.ts` module**: centralized gtag-based tracking with GA4
(`G-MRK8Q360DH`) + Google Ads (`AW-18078707186`) + Reddit Pixel
- **Remove Firebase Analytics SDK** from `firebase.ts` (~350 lines):
eliminates double GA4 config conflict, removes legacy tracking
functions/helpers and outdated Google Ads account (`AW-17720683288`)
- **Only `page_view` actively reported** to GA4 (via `usePageTracking`
hook); GA4 automatic events (`session_start`, `first_visit`) unaffected;
Reddit Pixel `PageVisit` fires alongside
- Remove `select_item` tracking calls from SideMenu and debug page
- Remove `platform` param from base event params (was sending incorrect
values)

## What's NOT changed
- Firebase Auth (`auth`, `setupRecaptcha`, etc.) untouched
- `updateRedditPixelWithUser` stays in `firebase.ts` (still imported by
`manager.ts`)
- Other tracking functions (`trackLogin`, `trackSignUp`, etc.) defined
but not wired — ready for future PRs

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify GA4 realtime shows `page_view` events with `app_name:
zooclaw`
- [ ] Verify no duplicate `page_view` from Firebase Analytics SDK
- [ ] Verify Reddit Pixel `PageVisit` fires on navigation
- [ ] Verify SideMenu search history click still works (no tracking,
just navigation)
- [ ] Verify debug page loads with only page_view test button
- [ ] Verify login/auth flow unaffected (Firebase Auth intact)

commit.message:
test(web): 清除 29 处冗余 expect(getBy*/findBy*).toBeDefined() (#1035)

## Summary

Follow-up from #1031 review feedback——清除 RTL 的 `getBy*` / `findBy*`
查询结果上的冗余 `.toBeDefined()` 断言。

### 为什么是冗余

- RTL 的 `getBy*` 未找到时 throw `TestingLibraryElementError`
- `findBy*` 在 timeout 后 throw（默认 1s）
- 两者**永远不返回 undefined**

所以 `expect(getByText('x')).toBeDefined()` 等价于"如果 `x` 没找到就 throw，然后对永远真的
`.toBeDefined()` 断言"——query 本身就是断言，`.toBeDefined()` 纯装饰。

### 清理清单（29 处）

| 文件 | 处数 | 来自 PR | 查询类型 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tests/unit/components/artifacts/ArtifactPreview.unit.spec.tsx` | 19 |
#996 | `getByText / getByTitle / findByTestId / findByText` |
| `tests/unit/app/profile/GeneralTab.unit.spec.tsx` | 6 | #1013 |
`findByText / findByTestId` |
| `tests/unit/components/UserAvatar.unit.spec.tsx` | 4 | #1025 |
`getByTestId / getByText` |

### 保留的模式（**不是**冗余）

- `queryBy*` 返回 null 时**不抛** → `.not.toBeNull()` / `.toBeNull()` 是真实断言
- `container.querySelector(...)` 返回 null → 同样保留 null 检查
- PR #1031 (UserCard + UserMenu) 的同模式 2 处已在该 PR 的 commit `1f143acc8`
内清，本 PR 不重复

### 净改动

`+32 / -31` —— 基本是逐行替换，`expect(x).toBeDefined()` → `x // throws if
missing`。行数几乎不变。

## Test plan

- [x] 3 改动文件各自独立跑通（UserAvatar 37 / GeneralTab 18 / ArtifactPreview 16 =
71 tests）
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` 干净
- [x] `pnpm lint` 干净
- [ ] CI 绿

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test(web): T1 follow-up 回应 PR #1030 review 3 条 (#1034)

## Summary

回应 PR #1030 Claude/Codex review 的 3 条非阻塞观察,独立小 PR:

**1. 删除 extra coverage beforeEach 内层冗余 `vi.resetModules()`**
- 外层 describe 的 beforeEach 已经 `resetModules()`,内层双跑无害但冗余
- 保留 `vi.clearAllMocks()` 并重写注释说明其必要性:`vi.resetModules()` detach
模块缓存但**不会** detach window event listener,prior authManager imports 注册的
listener 会对 stale mock references 触发并造成 false-positive assertion

**2. 删除 extra coverage `'uninitialized users stay in type=0'` test 和包裹的
describe**
- 主 spec L123 `'should stay in type=0 when uninitialized — no guest
account creation'` 断言完全相同
- 保留主 spec 版本(命名更描述性),删 extra 版本

**3. 给 guest 403 test 加注释澄清 `detail.includes('Invalid user')` 分支**
- Review 怀疑 extra L689 `rejectedValueOnce(Error + { detail: 'Invalid
user' })` 缺 `status: 403`,可能不测 403 分支
- 读 `src/lib/auth/manager.ts` L87-97 确认:`isInvalidToken` 判定是 **OR** 逻辑,4
条件任一命中(`status === 403` OR `detail.includes('Invalid user')` OR
`message.includes('403')` OR `message.includes('Invalid user')`)
- extra 这个 test 实际覆盖 `detail.includes('Invalid user')` 分支,主 spec 的 guest
403 test 覆盖 `status === 403` 分支——**两个 test 测不同分支,非 duplicate**,添加 inline
注释澄清意图

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test:unit tests/unit/lib/auth/manager.unit.spec.ts` 26/26
全绿(27 - 1 duplicate)
- [ ] CI `code-quality / lint-and-test` 绿

下一 PR(已规划):T2-a tests 侧 helper 化(globalBridge / useSSEStream /
useLiteLLMApi 共 54 处自重复),作为独立 scope。

test(web): UserCard + UserMenu 全面覆盖 + 9 处 testid 契约 (#1031)

## Summary

Epic #894 coverage 推进。继 #1025 UserAvatar 之后，补齐 SideNav 里的用户 UI
双子星：**UserCard**（左下角用户卡片，192 行）+ **UserMenu**（点 UserCard 展开的下拉菜单，775
行）。两者原先 0 测试。

这是 plan 里**没列但 ROI 更高**的部分——实际承载"用户账户 + 订阅状态 + 高频入口"的 UI，每天被每个登录用户点击。

## 两个 commit（review-friendly）

### Commit 1：UserCard (33 tests / ~340 行)

- **avatar**：firebase photoURL 优先 / userInfo.photoURL fallback /
first-letter gradient；首字母大写化
- **displayName 回退链**：firebase > username > email > phone > 'User'
- **loading 状态**：hasFetched=false → 3 个 bouncing dots
- **status label 矩阵**：active/trialing/trial/asleep/default；canceling 覆写成
'Ending {date}'
- **status color + icon**：ecap-success-text+皇冠 /
text-destructive+clock(canceling) / ecap-warning-text+clock(downgrading)
/ text-muted-foreground+zzz(asleep) / trial 无 icon
- **menu toggle**：主 toggle + arrow 都调 onMenuToggle；mobile-app 调
onOpenMobileApp；undefined 不抛
- **arrow rotation**：isMenuOpen 控制 rotate-180
- **event listener 生命周期**：auth-state-changed + storage (USER_INFO key
过滤)

加 4 个 testid：user-card-toggle / user-card-mobile-app / user-card-arrow /
user-card-status

### Commit 2：UserMenu (65 tests / ~650 行)

**矩阵 + 状态大户**：
- **plan label 矩阵**：7 分支（active PLAN_INFO 命中 / 未命中 / null 默认 'Pro' /
trialing / trial / asleep / default）
- **plan sub-label + urgent**：trialing/trial 天数 key；daysLeft<=2 →
warning color
- **action button**：4 × status → label
(upgrade/subscribe/activate)；click → openPanel + close
- **credits display**：null→'-'；floor+localize；row click / Enter key →
billing tab
- **about credits popover**：click "?" 打开；stopPropagation；close menu 重置
- **navigation (3)**：settings/skills/sessions
- **external (6)**：Discord window.open；Prompt Gallery `<a>` 外链；What's
New → 100ms delayed dispatchEvent；Support；Mobile App
- **redeem flow (12)**：open modal；empty → errorInvalid；valid →
postAPI+toast+close；3 种 error code 分别映射；message fallback；throw →
catch；Enter submit；cancel/backdrop/inner 各种 close 场景；typing 清 error
- **logout (2)**：close + logout + location.href；rejection → Sentry
warning
- **event listener 生命周期 (3)**
- **click-outside + ESC (5)**：包括 containerRef toggle-click 保护 +
isOpen=false 不挂

加 5 个 testid：user-menu-profile / user-menu-action / user-menu-credits /
user-menu-redeem-modal / user-menu-redeem-submit

## 测试技术 note

- **fake timer + try/finally**：setTimeout(0) click-outside 延迟 +
setTimeout(100) 'open-guide-tour' dispatch 都用
`vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync` + try/finally 精确测试时序
- **`@/components/billing/constants` partial mock**：PLAN_INFO
保留真实（静态数据），只 mock `getUserDisplayStatus`
- **`AboutCreditsPopover` stub** 为可查的 testid 节点，避免它自身的深层依赖

## 规模

- 98 tests / ~1000 行测试代码
- 9 行源 testid
- 总 diff ~1100 行

注：超出了 `feedback_pr_size_range` (500-1000) 的上限，但 UserCard + UserMenu
紧密耦合（Card 点击才开 Menu），拆分会增加评审切换成本，经与用户确认选择合一 PR。

## Test plan

- [x] UserCard 33 tests 本地全绿
- [x] UserMenu 65 tests 本地全绿
- [x] 全仓 3088 passed / 1 todo（+98 tests vs main）
- [x] tsc --noEmit 干净
- [x] pnpm lint 干净
- [x] pnpm dup:tests 8.1% 在 10% 阈值内
- [ ] CI 绿

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

refactor(web): T1 合并 auth manager 两个 spec 去 89 行 clone (#1030)

## Summary

web 重复率系列第 4 个 PR,处理 tests 侧最大单 clone(89 行整块):

**问题**:`manager.unit.spec.ts` 和 `manager.extra.unit.spec.ts` 之间有 89 行
完全重复的 vi.mock setup(12 个 mock 块),占 extra spec 的 29%。

**约束**:vi.mock 不能抽到 helper 模块——vitest 把 `vi.mock` 物理 hoist
到 import 之前,在别的 module 调用不影响 spec 的 module resolution。
"抽共享 mock" 这个直觉方案对 vi.mock 完全失效。

**方案**:合并两 spec 到一文件
- extra 的 4 sub-describe 原样搬到主 spec 主 describe 末尾,包在
  `describe('extra coverage', () => { ... })` 里
- extra 独有的 `@sentry/nextjs` mock 并入主 spec mocks 区
- `afterEach` 加到 import(extra 用了 `vi.useRealTimers()`)
- 冗余的 `// @vitest-environment jsdom` pragma 去掉(config 默认 jsdom)
- 删除 `manager.extra.unit.spec.ts` 整文件

合并后 27 tests(主 19 + extra 8)全过,行为等价:
- extra 保留自己的 `beforeEach(vi.clearAllMocks)` 防御 window listener 污染
- `afterEach(vi.useRealTimers)` 局部化在 extra describe,不影响主 spec

## 重复率变化

- **tests: 8.05% → 7.86%** (304 → 303 clones,-88 duplicate lines)
- 单 cluster 下降 0.19%,后续 T2(globalBridge / useSSEStream / useLiteLLMApi
  等 helper 化)预计再压 ~2%

完整规划见 `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-web-dedup.md`。

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test:unit tests/unit/lib/auth/manager.unit.spec.ts` 27/27 全绿
- [x] `pnpm test:unit` 3002 tests 全绿(无 auth manager 相关回归)
- [x] `pnpm lint` 通过
- [x] `pnpm dup:tests` 本地:8.05% → 7.86%
- [ ] CI `code-quality / lint-and-test` 绿,Web Duplication
Summary(tests)显示 7.86%

fix(web): 价格展示统一向上取整（ceil 替代 round） (#1026)

## Summary
- 订阅面板 / 付费拦截弹窗 / 公开定价页 的价格展示从 `Math.round` 改为 `Math.ceil`，避免年付月均被向下舍入。
- 典型改动：**Pro 年付** `$1000/yr ÷ 12 = 83.33` 之前显示 `$83`，现显示
**`$84`**；Starter 整除、Ultra 余 .67 不变。
- 历史账单 `InvoiceHistory` 保持 `toFixed(2)` 精确金额不动（历史扣款金额不应向上取整）。

## Changed files
| 文件 | 作用 |
|---|---|
| `web/src/components/billing/PlanCard.tsx:192` | 订阅面板计划卡 `/mo` 价 |
| `web/src/components/PaywallContent.tsx:38` | 付费拦截弹窗 Starter 价 |
| `web/src/app/[locale]/pricing/PublicPricingClient.tsx:65` | 公开定价页
`formatPrice` 通用美元展示 |
| `web/src/app/[locale]/pricing/PublicPricingClient.tsx:864` | 公开定价页
`getPrice` 年付月均 cents |

公开定价页是两层取整（cents → 整 cents，再 cents → 美元），两处都用 `ceil` 才能保证最终显示为向上取整。

## Test plan
- [ ] 订阅面板切到 Yearly，Pro 卡片显示 `$84 / month, billed yearly`
- [ ] 订阅面板 Yearly 下 Starter `$20`、Ultra `$167` 不变
- [ ] 付费拦截弹窗 Yearly 下 Starter 价格正确
- [ ] 公开定价页 `/pricing` Yearly 下三档价格分别为 `$20 / $84 / $167`
- [ ] 公开定价页 Monthly 下三档价格不变

test(web): UserAvatar 全面覆盖 + 5 处 testid 契约 (#1025)

## Summary

Epic #894 coverage 推进：公共 `PageHeader` 里的用户头像 + 下拉菜单组件 `UserAvatar.tsx`
(262 行) 原先 0 测试，一次补齐。

这是继 #1013 GeneralTab 和 #1021 dead code cleanup 之后，转向 plan 里**没列但 ROI
更高**的 real user-facing UI 的第一个 PR——下一步计划 UserCard + UserMenu。

### 37 tests / 450 行覆盖

| 分组 | tests | 覆盖点 |
|---|---|---|
| login gate | 2 | 未登录→null；登录→render |
| avatar image | 4 | firebase photoURL 优先 / userInfo fallback / SVG
placeholder / onError 回退 |
| 订阅星标 | 3 | user_type + expired 三态（橙/灰/不渲染）|
| dropdown toggle | 4 | click 开/关 + mousedown 外部关闭 + 内部保持 |
| 账号副标签 | 3 | email / phone / neither → 3 i18n key |
| displayName 回退链 | 3 | firebase > email > phone > 'User' |
| language grid | 3 | 10 locale 渲染 / setLocale click / active bg-accent
|
| profile action | 1 | push /profile + close |
| upgrade VIP | 5 | 显示条件 + renewVIP/upgradeVIP label + push
/subscription |
| logout | 3 | logoutUser({silent:true}) + location.href / Sentry
warning on rejection |
| event listener 生命周期 | 6 | storage + auth-state-changed + storage key
过滤 + interval cleanup |

### 源组件微改（+8 / -1 行）

加 5 处 `data-testid` 按 `{feature}-{element}` 约定：
`user-avatar-button` / `user-avatar-star` / `user-avatar-profile` /
`user-avatar-upgrade` / `user-avatar-logout`

### 测试技术 note

SVG element 的 `className` 是 `SVGAnimatedString` 不是 `string` —— 对 SVG
的类断言用 `getAttribute('class')` 而非 `.className`。已沉淀到 test file。

## Test plan

- [x] 37 tests 本地全绿（269ms）
- [x] 全仓 2990 passed / 1 todo（基线 +37）
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` 干净
- [x] `pnpm lint` 干净
- [x] `pnpm dup` tests 8.1% 在 10% 阈值内
- [ ] CI 绿

refactor(web): 抽 authHeaders + agents install/uninstall factory (#894 Step S2+S3) (#1024)

## Summary

web 代码重复率系列第 2 个 PR,合并了原 plan 的 S2 + S3 两个 cluster,并带上 S1(PR
#1017)遗漏的单测补上:

**S3 — `authHeaders` 抽取**(`web/src/lib/api/_authHeaders.ts`)
- 6 个 openclaw/integration/connector 客户端的同名 `function authHeaders()` 合并
- 影响:openclaw / openclaw-admin / openclaw-releases / openclaw-settings /
integrations / connectors
- 按 CLAUDE.md 规则不留 re-export shim,所有 caller 改 import

**S2 — agents
factory**(`web/src/app/api/openclaw/agents/_agentActionHandler.ts`)
- 4 个 route.ts(install / install/async / uninstall / uninstall/async)原先
60-75 行同构
- 抽 `runAgentProxyRoute()` 底层共享 ensureBotReady + proxy + error 处理
- `createInstallHandler` / `createUninstallHandler` 分别处理各自的 body schema
/ validation
- 4 个 route.ts 各自缩到 ~8 行 config wrapper
- 行为被现有 `openclaw-agents-install-uninstall.unit.spec.ts` (380 行) 守护

**S1 补测** —
`tests/unit/app/api/openclaw-admin-releases-actions.unit.spec.ts` (7
cases)
- PR #1017 抽的 release factory 原先没单测(review 暴露出来的 gap)
- 覆盖:3 action 各自路径 + version encoding + backend error 透传 + fallback +
catch

## Summary

Epic #894 coverage 工作中发现的清理：`ProfilePageClient.tsx` 只渲染 `<GeneralTab
/>`，其他 5 个 tab 组件已彻底 orphan，继续给它们写测试纯属 coverage 数字游戏。本 PR 一次性清掉。

### 被删除的 orphan 文件（-1398 行）

| 文件 | 行数 | 状态 |
|---|---|---|
| `web/src/app/[locale]/profile/components/ProfileTab.tsx` | 491 | 无
import |
| `web/src/app/[locale]/profile/components/IdentityTab.tsx` | 290 |
DiaryCards 被 #1000 搬走后失去最后依赖 |
| `web/src/app/[locale]/profile/components/BillingTab.tsx` | 309 | 无
import |
| `web/src/app/[locale]/profile/components/ChannelsTab.tsx` | 114 | 无
import |
| `web/src/app/[locale]/profile/components/UserSettingsTab.tsx` | 86 | 无
import |
| `web/tests/unit/app/profile/UserSettingsTab.unit.spec.tsx` | 107 |
#1008 的 dead-code test |
| `web/eslint.config.mjs` | 1 line | 删除 ProfileTab 的 legacy complexity
豁免 |

### 验证过的保留项

- `GeneralTab.tsx` — `ProfilePageClient.tsx:21` 唯一渲染的 tab
- `UsageTab.tsx` — 虽无 default export，但 `BillingTabContent` /
`UsageTabContent` named exports 被 `ClawSettingsClient.tsx` 使用
-
`web/tests/unit/app/claw-settings/{ModelSection,SaveButton,TimezoneSection}.unit.spec.tsx`
— 同 #1008 但测 live 组件，不删

### 背景

Coverage plan 的 "Step 8 剩余 tabs" 是 2 周前写的，当时 Profile 页还是多 tab 结构。之后
Profile 简化为仅 GeneralTab，#1000 又把 DiaryCards 从 IdentityTab 搬到
GeneralTab，至此其余 5 个 tab 完全孤立。继续给它们写测试会像 #1008 的 UserSettingsTab 测试一样——CI
绿、auto-review APPROVE，但测的是不渲染的代码。

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test:unit` 2944 passed / 1 todo（原 2951 - 7 个被删 test）

commit.message:
fix: default groupPolicy to 'open' in platform setup wizards (#1022)

## Summary
- Slack, Telegram, Discord setup wizards hardcoded `groupPolicy` default
to `'allowlist'`, inconsistent with backend schema default (`'open'`)
and the generic ChannelsSection modal
- Changed all three wizards to default `groupPolicy` to `'open'`

## Root Cause
The backend schema (`openclaw_settings.py`) and the generic add-channel
modal (`ChannelsSection.tsx`) both default `group_policy` to `'open'`.
However, the platform-specific setup wizards (`SlackSetupWizard`,
`TelegramSetupWizard`, `DiscordSetupWizard`) each independently
initialized `useState('allowlist')`, causing newly added channels to
silently use `allowlist` instead of the intended `open` policy.

## Test plan
- [ ] Add a Slack/Telegram/Discord channel via the setup wizard without
changing the group policy setting
- [ ] Verify the channel's `group_policy` is `open` (not `allowlist`)
after creation
- [ ] Verify that manually selecting `allowlist` in the wizard still
works correctly

commit.message:
feat(ios): Integrate Pulse for in-app network debugging (#994)

## Summary

- Add [Pulse](https://github.com/kean/Pulse) (v5.1.4) as an SPM
dependency for in-app network request inspection
- Use `URLSessionProxy` to capture full request/response bodies
including async/await calls
- Add hidden debug menu in Settings (tap version label 10x in DEBUG
builds) to open Pulse's network console
- Include log export functionality with error handling via share sheet

## Details

**Network logging:** `NetworkLogger.urlSession` provides a shared
`URLSessionProxy` instance used by both `NetworkService` and
`MattermostAPIService`. All network traffic (headers, bodies, metrics)
is logged to Pulse's `LoggerStore`.

**Debug UI:** `NetworkDebugView` wraps Pulse's `ConsoleView` in a
full-screen cover, gated behind `#if DEBUG`. Export uses the async
`LoggerStore.shared.export(to:)` API, triggered lazily on button tap
(not eagerly on render).

**No production UI impact:** All debug UI code is wrapped in `#if DEBUG`
and stripped from release builds. The `Pulse` framework itself is
included in production for network logging (PulseUI is debug-only).

## Test plan

- [ ] Build in DEBUG — verify no compiler errors
- [ ] Open Settings → tap version label 10 times → "Network Debug" row
appears
- [ ] Open Network Debug → verify requests appear with response bodies
- [ ] Tap share button → verify `.pulse` file export and share sheet
- [ ] Build in RELEASE — verify no debug UI is visible
- [ ] Verify existing network calls (chat, bot provisioning, auth) still
work

commit.message:
test(claw-interface): 合并 current_user dict 到 make_current_user helper (#1010)

## Summary

消除 \`current_user\` 6-field dict \`{"uid": X, "email": "", "name": "",
"user_type": "", "role": "", "token": Y}\` 在三个 test 文件里 inline 重复。

这是 5-PR 测试 review 系列的小尾巴 — deferred 自 PR 2 (OpenClaw builder 合并)。

## 改动

| 位置 | 之前 | 之后 |
|---|---|---|
| \`tests/unit/_builders.py\` | — | 新增 \`make_current_user(uid="user-1",
token="")\` |
| \`test_openclaw_endpoints_extra.py\` | 本地 \`_auth()\` 内联 6-field dict
| \`_auth\` 变 3 行 wrapper 调 \`make_current_user\` (保留本模块 default
\`uid="user1"\` 匹配请求体) |
| \`test_openclaw_routes.py\` | 8 处 inline dict |
\`make_current_user("user1")\` |
| \`test_user_credits.py\` | 3 处 inline dict |
\`make_current_user("user1")\` |

**跳过 \`test_auth.py\`**: 那里的 dict 是专门测 auth shape 行为的, 不是消费端, 应该保持
inline。

## 为什么不用现有的 \`current_user\` fixture

\`tests/unit/conftest.py\` 有 \`current_user\` fixture 返回固定 \`"user-1"\`,
但本 PR 的三个文件都需要:
- 参数化 \`uid\` (27 处不同 uid; \`_auth(uid="")\` 测空 uid 分支等)
- 参数化 \`token\` (4 处 \`_auth(token="tok")\`)

Fixture 不支持参数化, 所以 factory helper 更合适。两者并存 — fixture 给单值场景, helper
给参数化场景。

## Test plan

- [x] \`pytest tests/unit/test_openclaw_endpoints_extra.py
tests/unit/test_openclaw_routes.py tests/unit/test_user_credits.py\` —
95 passed
- [x] 全仓 \`pytest tests/unit tests/bdd\` — 2896 passed
- [x] \`ruff check\` + \`ruff format --check\` + pyright 全绿

**连接状态 / disable 联动**：wsStatus 非 connected → 输入框 + 上传按钮禁用

**Send 按钮 5 种 enablement 分支**：

**handleSend**：
- trim + clear input after send
- `quotedText` prepended as blockquote (`> ` prefix)
- 长 quote 截 200 char + 省略号

- `isGenerating` 下 Stop 替代 Send 按钮 + `onAbort` 触发

- `uploadOverride` 模式（Mattermost）走 override 不碰 R2

alert

chore(web): bump coverage floor 35% → 55% lines (#1009)

## Summary

Epic: #894 coverage roadmap — tight ratchet to enforce test-writing
discipline.

### 当前 main 实测

| 指标 | 值 |
|---|---|
| **lines** | **56.49%** |
| statements | 55.05% |
| functions | 49.78% |
| branches | 46.93% |

### 本 PR

`web/vitest.config.mts` 的 threshold 从 `lines: 35` → `lines: 55`。

**margin 仅 ~1.5% 是刻意的**：contributors 新增生产代码但不写对应测试时，lines 就会跌破 55 → CI
fail → 强制本 PR 里带覆盖。目的是把"写测试"变成合规性要求而不是惯例建议。

**暂不加 statements/functions/branches threshold**：三项都在 46-55% 附近，加了容易卡正常功能
PR；Step 11 收尾时统一拉到 80% 目标。

开工时（`project_web_coverage_roadmap`）基线 47.4%，Step 6/7/10 系列合并后已到 ~56%。原
35% 底线已完全失效。55% 既能挡 regression 又能强制未来带测试。

commit.message:
refactor(auth): remove guest account registration for unregistered visitors (#1004)

## Summary
- **Remove `initializeAsGuest()` flow** — unregistered visitors no
longer get UIDs from gem-account. They stay in `type='0'` with only
`device_id` initialized.
- **Expired type='2' guests** — cleared back to `type='0'` (via
`clearUserStorage()`) instead of re-registering. Existing guests with
valid tokens continue working until natural expiry (Option A).
- **Guard `InviteCodeStep`** — only call `createAndSyncUser` for
`type='1'` (logged-in users), closing a residual guest backend-creation
path.
- **Update unit tests** — 4 test blocks rewritten to assert new
behavior: no `getAnonymousToken` calls, `clearUserStorage` on expired
guest tokens.

## Context
Zooclaw requires registration before using product features. The old
code created gem-account records for anonymous visitors on every app
startup, which was unnecessary. All product features already have uid
null-guards (`useBillingCredits`, `OpenClawContext`, `PaywallContent`,
etc.), so removing guest registration is safe.

## Changes
| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `web/src/lib/auth/manager.ts` | Remove `initializeAsGuest()`, skip
guest registration for type='0', clear expired type='2' |
| `web/src/components/onboarding/steps/InviteCodeStep.tsx` | Guard
`createAndSyncUser` to type='1' only |
| `web/tests/unit/lib/auth/manager.unit.spec.ts` | Rewrite 4 test blocks
for new auth behavior |

## Test plan
- [ ] Fresh visitor (no localStorage): lands on pages normally, no
gem-account API calls in Network tab
- [ ] Existing registered user (type='1'): login/sync/billing all work
unchanged
- [ ] Existing guest (type='2') with valid token: continues working
until token expires
- [ ] Existing guest with expired token: cleared to type='0', no
re-registration
- [ ] Chat / billing / settings: properly gated behind login (show login
modal or "please log in")

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

\`_mock_response(...)\` 合并到共享 \`tests/unit/_http_helpers.py\`。

**完全一致** (都是 MagicMock(spec=httpx.Response) + status_code +
json.return_value + 400 时的 HTTPStatusError side_effect)
- **openclaw_client** 版签名不同 (\`json_data\` 在前, 没 spec), 20+ 调用点, 留 2 行
wrapper 保留本模块 signature 避免改所有 caller

| \`tests/unit/_http_helpers.py\` | **新建**
\`make_httpx_response(status_code=200, json_data=None)\` |

make_httpx_response as _mock_response\` |
| \`test_mattermost_client.py\` | 同上 |
| \`test_openclaw_client.py\` | 保留 2 行本地 wrapper

共享 helper 覆盖 PR 3 和 PR 4 的所有 BDD repo 测试:

- \`parse_kv(s)\` — 解析 \`"k=v,k2=v2:int,k3=true:bool"\` (支持 \`:int\` /
\`:float\` / \`:bool\` 类型后缀)

sentinel

### orders_repo BDD (8 scenarios)

重点覆盖 \`claim_entitlement_lock\` 的 CAS 语义 — 这个方法控制 Stripe webhook
重试时是否重复发放积分, query 有 \`\$ne + \$or\` 三段 escape hatch:

- Fresh order: 获得锁, 返回 BEFORE doc (有 \`in_progress\` 字段不存在)
- Already granted: \`\$ne: True\` 过滤命中, 返回 None
- Fresh in-progress lock held: 三段 \`\$or\` 都不匹配, 返回 None
- Stale lock reclaim: 通过 \`entitlement_grant_started_at < cutoff\` 分支匹配,
返回 BEFORE doc (显示 in_progress=True)

外加 \`claim_invoice_atomically\` (fresh + already-granted),
\`mark_entitlement_granted\`, \`release_entitlement_lock\`。

### integration_repo BDD (7 scenarios)

- \`upsert_connection\`: 真 mongo 验证 wrapper 注入 \`last_updated\`
timestamp (mock 抓不到)
- \`get_active_connection\`: 验证 \`status=connected AND enabled=true\`
双过滤实际排除 disconnected / disabled 行
- \`find_one_and_update\`: match + no-match 两种情况

test(web): Mattermost websocket service + Provider 覆盖 (#901 Step 7a) (#1003)

## Summary

Epic: #894 Step 7 — Mattermost 安全敏感层。拿 `websocket.ts` (196 行 0%) 和
`MattermostContext.tsx` (186 行 1.5%) 两个自成体系的模块先开工；`useMattermost` (839
行已 48% 覆盖) 留给后续 PR。

### lib/mattermost/websocket.ts（0% → 全面覆盖 service class，24 tests）

**connect()**：
- https→wss / http→ws URL scheme 映射
- onopen 发 `authentication_challenge` 帧（token + seq++）
- onerror reject promise
- 15s ping interval 启动；ws 非 OPEN 时 skip ping（防 zombie send）

**onmessage**：
- 已知事件分发全部 handler
- 未知事件名 → `'unknown'`（防未来 MM 版本增事件后前端崩）
- `seq_reply` 有值 → 忽略（server ping echo）
- 恶意/错误 JSON 不 throw
- 缺 data/seq 用默认 `{}` / `0`

**hello 握手**：`connection_id` 字符串 → helloHandlers；非 string / 缺失 → 不触发

**onclose**：
- 非 1000 → Sentry breadcrumb（warning）
- 1000 → 不发（防 user 主动断连刷 Sentry 93K+ 事件）
- 所有 disconnectHandler 触发
- ping interval 清理

**decodePost**：string parse / 非 string / malformed JSON 三路径

**handler sets**：on*/off* 对称

### contexts/MattermostContext.tsx（1.5% → 全面 provider wiring，13 tests）

**hooks**：`useMattermostContext` provider 外抛明确错误；`useMattermostOptional`
返 null；provider 透传 + 补 `mmBots`/`refreshBots`

**auto-connect guards**：
- 所有前提满足 → `autoConnect`
- 匹配 bot 新鲜（<120s）→ 传 `bot_user_id`
- 匹配 bot 陈旧（>120s）→ `undefined`
- 缺 token / channelId → skip
- openclaw init 非 ready → skip
- `isReconnectExhausted` → skip（**防无限 reconnect 刷 Sentry**）
- 已 attempt 再 render → 不重复 fire

**agent-updated 事件**：connected 才触发
`forceRefetchUserBusinessData`；unmount 清 window listener

## 测试结果

```
tests/unit/lib/mattermost/websocket.unit.spec.ts     24 passed
tests/unit/contexts/MattermostContext.unit.spec.tsx  13 passed
```

全仓 `pnpm test:unit`：2862 passed / 1 todo。`pnpm lint` / `npx tsc
--noEmit` 干净。

- [x] 37 tests 本地全绿
- [x] tsc --noEmit 通过
- [x] pnpm lint 通过
- [ ] CI 绿
- [ ] 人审

commit.message:
test(web): ArtifactPreview 组件覆盖 (#904 Step 10c 收尾) (#996)

## Summary

Epic: #894 Step 10 收尾。覆盖 `ArtifactPreview` 从 0% → 全面主路径，加上 Step 10a
(#989) / 10b (#992) 一起把 Markdown + Artifacts 模块拉齐。

### 覆盖面 (17 tests, 312 LoC)

**Header & toolbar**：文件名 / 标签 / 4 个工具按钮 title / 关闭回调

**Preview/Source toggle**：
- toggleable ext (html/svg/md/csv/xlsx/mermaid) 显示 toggle
- 非 toggleable (pdf) 不显示
- 切 source 视图换成 SourceRenderer

**Copy link**：
- `clipboard.writeText` 收到原始 URL（非 cache-busted）
- "Copied!" 状态 2s 后 revert
- clipboard 拒绝时不 throw

**Download**：
- fetch + Blob + createObjectURL + revokeObjectURL 完整流程
- fetch 失败 → `window.open(_blank)`

**FileAvailabilityGate**：
- checking → spinner
- fetch 200 → ready / 渲染对应 renderer
- 持续 500 → 退尽 5 次重试后"File is not available yet" + Retry +
`rel="noopener"` 外链

**URL 变更 reset**：`file.url` prop 变 → viewMode 自动回到 preview

**renderByExt 分发**：pdf → PdfRenderer / py → CodeRenderer / 未知 ext →
FallbackRenderer

### 关键技术 memo

- 所有 renderer 用 `vi.mock` stub 打上 data-testid，断言分发正确 renderer
- `next/dynamic` 通过 passthrough mock 让 Excel/Mermaid/Docx/Pptx 在 jsdom 能
resolve
- `navigator.clipboard` / `global.fetch` / `window.open` 用
snapshot+restore 防泄漏到其他 suite（参 #992 review）
- `FileAvailabilityGate` 的 setTimeout 重试链用 `vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync`
在 fake timer 下 flush microtasks

## Summary

Epic: #894 Step 10 收尾。覆盖 `ArtifactPreview` 从 0% → 全面主路径，加上 Step 10a
(#989) / 10b (#992) 一起把 Markdown + Artifacts 模块拉齐。

### 覆盖面 (17 tests, 312 LoC)

**Header & toolbar**：文件名 / 标签 / 4 个工具按钮 title / 关闭回调

**Preview/Source toggle**：
- toggleable ext (html/svg/md/csv/xlsx/mermaid) 显示 toggle
- 非 toggleable (pdf) 不显示
- 切 source 视图换成 SourceRenderer

**Copy link**：
- `clipboard.writeText` 收到原始 URL（非 cache-busted）
- "Copied!" 状态 2s 后 revert
- clipboard 拒绝时不 throw

**Download**：
- fetch + Blob + createObjectURL + revokeObjectURL 完整流程
- fetch 失败 → `window.open(_blank)`

**FileAvailabilityGate**：
- checking → spinner
- fetch 200 → ready / 渲染对应 renderer
- 持续 500 → 退尽 5 次重试后"File is not available yet" + Retry +
`rel="noopener"` 外链

**URL 变更 reset**：`file.url` prop 变 → viewMode 自动回到 preview

**renderByExt 分发**：pdf → PdfRenderer / py → CodeRenderer / 未知 ext →
FallbackRenderer

### 关键技术 memo

- 所有 renderer 用 `vi.mock` stub 打上 data-testid，断言分发正确 renderer
- `next/dynamic` 通过 passthrough mock 让 Excel/Mermaid/Docx/Pptx 在 jsdom 能
resolve
- `navigator.clipboard` / `global.fetch` / `window.open` 用
snapshot+restore 防泄漏到其他 suite（参 #992 review）
- `FileAvailabilityGate` 的 setTimeout 重试链用 `vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync`
在 fake timer 下 flush microtasks

commit.message:
test(claw-interface): user_repo 原子操作测试迁移到 BDD (真 mongo) (#999)

## Summary

测试目录 review 的 PR 3: 把 \`tests/unit/test_user_repo.py\` 里依赖 motor mock
的原子操作测试迁到 BDD, 用真 mongodb 去跑 \`\$set\` / \`\$unset\` / \`\$inc\` /
\`\$setOnInsert\` 语义。

**动机**: Mock-based 测试只能验证 "repo 调用了哪些 mongo 方法 + 传了什么参数", 不能验证 "这个
update doc 对 mongo 真的会产生预期效果"。原子操作尤其容易在这里出 bug — 例如 \`\$inc\` 对 string
类型字段会报 WriteError。迁到 BDD 后测试实际 end-to-end 验证 round-trip 行为。

## 迁移范围

| Unit 测试类 (删) | BDD scenario (加) | 真 mongo 验证什么 |
|---|---|---|
| TestUpsertOnInsert × 2 | upsert_on_insert new / existing |
\`\$setOnInsert\` 只在 insert 时写入, 不覆盖已有值 |
| TestUpsertFields × 2 | upsert_fields new / existing | \`\$set\` +
\`upsert=True\` 语义; insert vs update 的 upserted_id 返回 |
| TestUpdateFields × 1 | update_fields | 基础 \`\$set\` 写入 |
| TestUnsetFields × 3 | unset_fields dotted / multi / noop | 点路径
\`connectors.google\` 的 \`\$unset\`; 空列表短路不调用 mongo |
| TestUpdateAndUnsetFields × 3 | update_and_unset_fields both /
empty-unset | \`\$set + \$unset\` 原子; 空 unset 列表时省略 \`\$unset\` key |
| TestUpdateAndIncrementFields × 1 | update_and_increment_fields |
\`\$set + \$inc\` 原子, 需 int 类型字段 |

**保留在 unit** (BDD 无增量价值, mock 验证 call-args 足够): \`get_user\` /
\`get_by_stripe_customer_id\` / \`get_by_phone_number\` /
\`count_users\` / \`list_users\` / \`batch_get_users\` /
\`update_subscription_info\` / \`search_profiles\` /
\`batch_get_profiles\` / \`ensure_indexes\`。

## 实现细节

- \`parsers.re\` 替代 \`parsers.parse\` 以允许空字符串捕获 (如 \`paths ""\`, \`unset
""\` 场景)
- \`:int\` / \`:float\` 类型后缀: Gherkin 默认把捕获当 string, 但 \`\$inc\` 目标字段必须是
mongo 数值类型 — 在 Given step 用 \`completed_billing_cycles=0:int\` 标注
- 遵循 \`tests/bdd/step_defs/test_openclaw_repo.py\` 的结构: scenario
bindings → Given → When → Then, 用 \`run_async(coro)\` 桥接 (memory
\`reference_local_bdd_mongo\`)

## Test plan

- [x] \`TEST_MONGODB_HOST=127.0.0.1 MONGODB_USER= MONGODB_PASSWORD=
pytest tests/bdd/step_defs/test_user_repo.py\` — 11 passed
- [x] \`pytest tests/unit/test_user_repo.py\` — 16 passed
- [x] \`app.database.user_repo\` coverage 100% (unit + BDD 合起来)
- [x] \`ruff check\` + \`ruff format --check\` 全绿
- [ ] CI \`python-code-quality / build-and-test\` (含 mongodb service
container)

## 后续 PR

- PR 4: \`test_orders_repo.py\` + \`test_integration_repo.py\` → BDD
- PR 5: Mock-cascade 瘦身 + \`_mock_response\` 合并

\`_make_session\` 方法。

提供三个 keyword-only-参数的共享 builder:
- \`make_user(uid, app_id, app_token, platform_url, bots, team_key,
selected_agent_ids, custom_agents)\`
- \`make_bot(bot_id, bot_name, ws_url, token, access_token, status,
created_at, mattermost_bots, **extra)\`
- \`make_live_config(agent_ids, agent_metas)\` — 接受 optional
\`agent_metas\` map, 让调用方注入模块特有的 name/emoji

所有 optional 字段仅在传入时才注入 user dict, 让测试能对 "字段存在与否" 做断言。

## Summary

Epic: #894 Step 10 — Markdown/Artifacts 首个子 PR。覆盖两个纯工具模块，为后续
MarkdownContent / ArtifactPreview / useResizable 组件测试铺垫。

- `artifacts/types.ts` 24% → 全面覆盖（getFileIcon / getFileLabel /
getExtFromUrl / isArtifactUrl / isFileExt / extractFileLinks）
- `markdown/renderMarkdownToHtml.ts` 47% → 全面覆盖（escapeHtml / heading /
paragraph / blockquote / hr / list / table / link (regular vs artifact
file-card) / codespan / code block (ecap-card + inline media HTML +
单行文件路径) / image (compact/default + blur layer) / 自定义 `[video:...]` /
box-drawing `<pre>` / 100k 截断）

### 安全断言

| 攻击面 | 测试 |
|---|---|
| Host 白名单 | `isArtifactUrl` 拒 `evil.com` /
`artifacts.zooclaw.ai.evil.com` / malformed / `javascript:` |
| 链接属性注入 | 链接 URL 中的 `"` 被 `"` 转义，防属性提前终止 |
| File-card `data-*` 属性 | URL + name 的 `"` 全部 escape |
| Open redirect via bare URL | `extractFileLinks` 对非 artifact host 的
bare URL 不走 file-card |
| Link target | 所有非 artifact 链接 `target="_blank" rel="noopener
noreferrer"` |

### 测试过程发现的 bug（独立 issue，不在本 PR 修）

- **#988** — `renderMarkdownToHtml`：`___BASE64_IMG_n___` 占位符与 markdown
bold+italic 语法冲突，marked 解析后 placeholder 被 mangle，base64 图片永远不渲染
- **Observation**（未 raise issue）：`extractFileLinks` step 3（ecap-card
JSON 的 name/title fallback）在 URL 是 http(s) 时被 step 2 的 bare-URL scan
抢先去重，实际不可达；JSON 的 `name`/`title` 字段被忽略，UI 显示 URL basename。测试里加了注释，UX
范畴非安全类

## 测试结果

```

--noEmit` 干净。

commit.message:
refactor(claw-interface): app/ 启用 PLR2004 — HTTPStatus + 业务常量 (#984)

## Summary
把 ruff **PLR2004**（magic-value-comparison）从全局 ignore 下沉为 `tests/**/*.py`
和 `app/routes/litellm.py`（legacy）的 per-file-ignore。让生产代码里真·业务魔法值显形，不再被
tests 的 HTTP 码噪声淹没。

原先 ignore 里 PLR2004 总违规 750+（其中 app/ 55、tests/ 695）；本 PR 清掉 app/ 的 40
处（另 15 处集中在 legacy `litellm.py`，per-file 豁免）。

**第二轮追加**：顺手把 SIM117 遗留的 `app/services/agent_identity.py` /
`app/services/apple_service.py` 两个 per-file-ignore 也摘了 —— 用 Python 3.10+
多上下文 `async with` 合并嵌套的 aiohttp session，替代之前的 ignore（详见文末"SIM117 收尾"段）。

## 改动分三类

### 1) HTTP status → `http.HTTPStatus` 枚举（18 处 / 12 文件）
```python
# before
if response.status_code == 404:

# after
from http import HTTPStatus
if response.status_code == HTTPStatus.NOT_FOUND:
```
用到的成员：`OK / BAD_REQUEST / UNAUTHORIZED / NOT_FOUND /
CONFLICT`。`HTTPStatus` 是 stdlib `IntEnum`，与 int 比较零开销；纯可读性提升。

### 2) 业务魔法值 → 模块级命名常量（13 常量 / 10 文件）
| 文件 | 常量 | 含义 |
|---|---|---|
| `app/settings.py` | `_SECRET_KEY_MIN_LEN = 16` | JWT HS256 签名最小熵 128
bits |
| `app/routes/admin_boost.py` | `_UIDS_BATCH_LIMIT = 50` | boost 接口批量上限
|
| `app/routes/openclaw_conversation.py` | `_TS_MS_BOUNDARY = 1e12` /
`_RUNNING_WINDOW_MS = 30_000` | 时间戳秒/毫秒判定、subagent 活跃窗口 |
| `app/routes/session/chat.py` | `_PROGRESS_LOG_INTERVAL_SEC = 30` /
`_INTERMEDIATE_SAVE_INTERVAL_SEC = 15` | SSE 流进度日志/中间结果落盘节奏 |
| `app/routes/session/utils.py` | `_MIN_TITLE_INPUT_LEN = 5` /
`_DESCRIPTION_MAX_LEN = 500` | title 生成最小输入、description 截断 |
| `app/services/agent_identity.py` | `_EMAIL_PREFIX_MIN_LEN = 3` /
`_EMAIL_PREFIX_MAX_LEN = 30` | LLM 生成 email 前缀的过滤窗口 |
| `app/services/asr/service.py` | `_MIN_ENHANCE_INPUT_LENGTH = 2` | ASR
后处理输入下限（已有 `_MAX_ENHANCE_INPUT_LENGTH`） |
| `app/services/integration_provider.py` | `_WEBHOOK_TS_TOLERANCE_SEC =
300` | Nango webhook replay-protection 窗口 |
| `app/services/media_utils.py` | `_JPEG_QUALITY_START/FLOOR/STEP =
95/50/10` | JPEG 重编码 size-fit 循环参数 |
| `app/services/openclaw/rate_limit.py` |
`_RATE_LIMIT_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 60` | 滑动窗口过期 UID 清理间隔 |
| `app/errors/__init__.py` | `_MIN_HTTP_STATUS = 100` /
`_MAX_HTTP_STATUS = 599` | upstream_status 合法范围校验 |

### 3) 结构性值 → `# noqa: PLR2004` + 说明（5 处）
这些"常量"其实是上下文已经自解释的结构量，抽取只会添噪：
- `split(" ", 1)` → `len(parts) == 2`（auth/dependencies.py ×2,
openclaw_integrations.py, bot_lifecycle.py）
- `[-4:]`/`[:8]` 切片长度校验（twilio.py, billing_client.py, openclaw_admin.py）

每处 noqa 都带 `# noqa: PLR2004 — structural: ...` 说明为什么。

## pyproject.toml 改动
```diff
 ignore = [
-    # Magic value comparisons — 750+ hits, mostly HTTP status codes in
-    # tests (`== 200`, `== 400`). Signal-to-noise too low to enable.
-    "PLR2004",
     ...
 ]

 [tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]
-"app/routes/litellm.py" = ["SIM117"]
-"app/services/agent_identity.py" = ["SIM117"]
-"app/services/apple_service.py" = ["SIM117"]
-"tests/**/*.py" = ["SIM117"]
+"app/routes/litellm.py" = ["SIM117", "PLR2004"]
+"tests/**/*.py" = ["SIM117", "PLR2004"]
```

## SIM117 收尾（第二次 push 加入）
之前 PR 把 SIM117 按 per-file-ignore 收敛时，给 `agent_identity.py` /
`apple_service.py` 留了豁免，理由是 "aiohttp session pattern 合法"。但 Python 3.10+
的**多上下文 `async with`** 其实能无代价合并：
```python
# before（SIM117 违规，per-file-ignore）
async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
    async with session.post(url) as resp:
        ...

# after（单 async with，多个 context manager，后者引用前者绑定）
async with (
    aiohttp.ClientSession() as session,
    session.post(url) as resp,
):
    ...
```

refactor(claw-interface): app/ 启用 PLR2004 — HTTPStatus + 业务常量 (#984)

## Summary
把 ruff **PLR2004**（magic-value-comparison）从全局 ignore 下沉为 `tests/**/*.py`
和 `app/routes/litellm.py`（legacy）的 per-file-ignore。让生产代码里真·业务魔法值显形，不再被
tests 的 HTTP 码噪声淹没。

原先 ignore 里 PLR2004 总违规 750+（其中 app/ 55、tests/ 695）；本 PR 清掉 app/ 的 40
处（另 15 处集中在 legacy `litellm.py`，per-file 豁免）。

**第二轮追加**：顺手把 SIM117 遗留的 `app/services/agent_identity.py` /
`app/services/apple_service.py` 两个 per-file-ignore 也摘了 —— 用 Python 3.10+
多上下文 `async with` 合并嵌套的 aiohttp session，替代之前的 ignore（详见文末"SIM117 收尾"段）。

## 改动分三类

### 1) HTTP status → `http.HTTPStatus` 枚举（18 处 / 12 文件）
```python
# before
if response.status_code == 404:

# after
from http import HTTPStatus
if response.status_code == HTTPStatus.NOT_FOUND:
```
用到的成员：`OK / BAD_REQUEST / UNAUTHORIZED / NOT_FOUND /
CONFLICT`。`HTTPStatus` 是 stdlib `IntEnum`，与 int 比较零开销；纯可读性提升。

### 2) 业务魔法值 → 模块级命名常量（13 常量 / 10 文件）
| 文件 | 常量 | 含义 |
|---|---|---|
| `app/settings.py` | `_SECRET_KEY_MIN_LEN = 16` | JWT HS256 签名最小熵 128
bits |
| `app/routes/admin_boost.py` | `_UIDS_BATCH_LIMIT = 50` | boost 接口批量上限
|
| `app/routes/openclaw_conversation.py` | `_TS_MS_BOUNDARY = 1e12` /
`_RUNNING_WINDOW_MS = 30_000` | 时间戳秒/毫秒判定、subagent 活跃窗口 |
| `app/routes/session/chat.py` | `_PROGRESS_LOG_INTERVAL_SEC = 30` /
`_INTERMEDIATE_SAVE_INTERVAL_SEC = 15` | SSE 流进度日志/中间结果落盘节奏 |
| `app/routes/session/utils.py` | `_MIN_TITLE_INPUT_LEN = 5` /
`_DESCRIPTION_MAX_LEN = 500` | title 生成最小输入、description 截断 |
| `app/services/agent_identity.py` | `_EMAIL_PREFIX_MIN_LEN = 3` /
`_EMAIL_PREFIX_MAX_LEN = 30` | LLM 生成 email 前缀的过滤窗口 |
| `app/services/asr/service.py` | `_MIN_ENHANCE_INPUT_LENGTH = 2` | ASR
后处理输入下限（已有 `_MAX_ENHANCE_INPUT_LENGTH`） |
| `app/services/integration_provider.py` | `_WEBHOOK_TS_TOLERANCE_SEC =
300` | Nango webhook replay-protection 窗口 |
| `app/services/media_utils.py` | `_JPEG_QUALITY_START/FLOOR/STEP =
95/50/10` | JPEG 重编码 size-fit 循环参数 |
| `app/services/openclaw/rate_limit.py` |
`_RATE_LIMIT_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 60` | 滑动窗口过期 UID 清理间隔 |
| `app/errors/__init__.py` | `_MIN_HTTP_STATUS = 100` /
`_MAX_HTTP_STATUS = 599` | upstream_status 合法范围校验 |

### 3) 结构性值 → `# noqa: PLR2004` + 说明（5 处）
这些"常量"其实是上下文已经自解释的结构量，抽取只会添噪：
- `split(" ", 1)` → `len(parts) == 2`（auth/dependencies.py ×2,
openclaw_integrations.py, bot_lifecycle.py）
- `[-4:]`/`[:8]` 切片长度校验（twilio.py, billing_client.py, openclaw_admin.py）

每处 noqa 都带 `# noqa: PLR2004 — structural: ...` 说明为什么。

test(web): LoginForm 单元覆盖 (#900 Step 6b, security-heavy) (#974)

## Summary

覆盖 #900 Auth/Login 最后一块且最安全敏感的 `LoginForm.tsx`（126 行 0% →
全面覆盖）。**Stacked on #972**（base=feature/more-web-coverage），#972 merge
后会自动 retarget 到 main。

### 覆盖面 (34 tests)
- 3 主 flow：Google popup/redirect / Phone SMS / Email OTP
- 8 国 phone 校验（中/美/加/墨/印/菲/越/韩）与自定义位数规则
- localStorage / sessionStorage 真值持久化（使用真 \`STORAGE_KEYS\` import）
- bfcache pageshow persisted 重置 isLoading
- unmount 清 recaptcha

### 按 #894 bug-hunting 协议的**安全断言**
| 攻击面 | 断言 |
|---|---|
| Open-redirect / URL injection | \`router.push\` 收到 **精确**
\`\`/user/verify?phone=\${encodeURIComponent('+' + country +
digits)}\`\`，禁止未来有人把 raw \`phoneNumber\` 或未 encode 的字符串塞进 URL |
| 信息泄漏 | Firebase 错误无 code 无 message → 必须 fallback 到通用 \`Failed to send
SMS. Please try again.\` —— 防 firebase 内部 projectId / trace 漏给用户 |
| 错误码白名单 | \`auth/invalid-app-credential\` /
\`auth/captcha-check-failed\` 映射固定文案；其它 code 透传 \`message\`（测试验证 raw
firebase message 在前两种 code 下不出现在 DOM 里） |
| Mobile 降级 | iPhone UA 走 \`signInWithRedirect\`（popup 在 mobile Safari
不可靠），desktop 走 \`signInWithPopup\` |

### 未塞进此 PR 的跟进项（按 \`feedback_test_as_bug_hunt\`）
Google flow 中 \`saveLoginInfo\` 成功但 \`loginUser\` 抛错的半登录态清理缺失——将另起
issue，不在测试 PR 里修。

## 测试结果

\`\`\`
tests/unit/components/LoginForm.unit.spec.tsx   34 passed (34)
\`\`\`

\`pnpm lint\` 干净；\`npx tsc --noEmit\` 干净。

## Test plan

- [x] 34 tests 本地全绿
- [x] tsc --noEmit 通过
- [x] pnpm lint 通过
- [ ] CI 绿
- [ ] 人审

校验（拒绝无活跃订阅用户的 grant 请求，支持 `skip_subscription_check` override）

modal（进度条、暂停/继续/停止、失败重试，幂等 key = `campaign_uid`）

用户展示一次性补偿通知，localStorage dismiss

`subscription_status=expired` 用户，验证返回 400

chore(claw-interface): 收敛 ruff ignore — 摘 SIM102/108/B905，SIM117 per-file (#982)

## Summary
- 移除 3 条 ruff ignore（**SIM102 / SIM108 / B905**），用 5 行代码改动修掉残余违规
- **SIM117** 从全局 ignore 下沉为 `[tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]`：仅 3 个
app/ 文件（aiohttp 会话模式）+ `tests/**/*.py`（`with patch() as` 嵌套）豁免；新违规 CI 会
fail
- 重写 `pyproject.toml` ignore 注释块：移除 "aligned with ecap-agent-platform"
框架（那套代码已迁移到本仓，不再需要跨仓一致性），每条 ignore 补上本仓独立的保留理由

## 代码改动（5 行修复）
| 文件 | 规则 | 修法 |
|---|---|---|
| `app/services/stripe/handlers/subscription.py` | SIM108 | if/else 压成三元
|
| `app/routes/openclaw_admin.py` | B905 | `zip(..., strict=True)`（两侧同源自

test(web): AuthProvider/LoginModal/LoginCheckProvider 覆盖 (#900 Step 6a) (#972)

## Summary

覆盖 #900 Auth/Login 0% 区的 3 个 shell 组件（轻量、非 security-heavy 部分）。

- `AuthProvider.unit.spec.tsx` (11 tests, 266 行)
  - init guard 防 StrictMode 重入
  - RAF 优先 + 500ms setTimeout fallback
  - Sentry 兜底 (`captureMessage` warning/error)
  - `onAuthStateChanged` photoURL/displayName 缓存同步 + 相同值不 dispatch
  - unsubscribe 在 unmount 调用
- `LoginModal.unit.spec.tsx` (10 tests, 138 行)
  - `shouldRender` false 时不渲染，300ms 延迟卸载匹配 exit 动画
- Escape / close 按钮 / backdrop click 均走 `onClose`；card click
stopPropagation
  - `onLoginSuccess` 存在时优先，否则 fallback 到 `onClose`
  - 关闭后 keydown listener 必须解绑
- `LoginCheckProvider.unit.spec.tsx` (11 tests, 318 行)
  - `useLoginCheck` 脱离 provider throws
  - `show-login-modal` 全局事件 → 开 modal；unmount 解绑防 leak
  - `pathname` 切换 → 自动关 modal
  - `onLoginSuccess` 订阅 + unsubscribe 正确移除；**订阅者异常不影响兄弟回调**

## 测试结果

```
tests/unit/components/AuthProvider.unit.spec.tsx    11 passed
tests/unit/components/LoginModal.unit.spec.tsx      10 passed
tests/unit/components/LoginCheckProvider.unit.spec.tsx 11 passed
Tests  32 passed (32)
```

`pnpm lint` 干净；`npx tsc --noEmit` 干净。

无新 prod bug —— 3 个组件实际行为与注释一致。

commit.message:
fix(sentry): drop MM connection lost events + fix rate-limit fingerprint (#978)

## Summary
- **Drop Mattermost connection lost events** in `beforeSend` — old
cached releases still emit `captureException` (243K events / 53 users /
7 days). New code already uses `Sentry.logger` which bypasses
`beforeSend`, so only legacy code paths are affected.
- **Fix rate-limit fingerprint derivation** — was using `exception.type`
(`"Error"` for all JS errors → one shared bucket), now uses
`exception.value` (actual error message) for per-error-type rate
limiting.

## Context
- Sentry issue:
[ECAP-WEBSITE-A4](https://serendipity-one-inc.sentry.io/issues/7401127622/)
- Previous fix (#944) migrated `captureMMConnectionFailure` to
`Sentry.logger` — **0 events from the latest release**
- But users on old cached releases continue to flood: top user alone
generated **82,759 events**
- `beforeSend` is the only place we can intercept events from old
bundles

## Test plan
- [ ] Deploy and verify ECAP-WEBSITE-A4 event rate drops to zero within
minutes
- [ ] Verify other Sentry issues (non-MM) still report normally
- [ ] Confirm `Sentry.logger` MM connection diagnostics remain visible
in Sentry Logs tab

commit.message:
fix(eca-464): only show upgrade banner when current version is older (#977)

## Summary

The version-check endpoint used `!=` to decide whether to show the
upgrade banner, so a user running a **newer** dev image (e.g. via the
@srp.one version selector) than the latest published release would still
see "Upgrade available" — effectively prompting a downgrade.

Switch to numeric tuple comparison (`(2026,3,13,41) < (2026,4,2,9)`) so
the banner only appears when the bot's image is **strictly older** than
the latest published release.

## Changes

- **New**: `app/services/openclaw/version.py` —
`extract_version_from_image`, `parse_version_tuple`, `version_is_older`
(extracted from `openclaw.py` to stay under 500-line limit)
- **Modified**: `app/routes/openclaw.py` — import helpers, use
`_version_is_older()` instead of `!=`
- **Tests**: 14 new tests (5 for `parse_version_tuple`, 9 for
`version_is_older`, 1 new endpoint test for "current is newer")

## Key behaviors

| Current version | Latest release | `needs_upgrade` | Why |
|---|---|---|---|
| `2026.3.13.34` | `2026.3.13.35` | ✅ True | older |
| `2026.3.13.35` | `2026.3.13.35` | ❌ False | same |
| `2026.4.2.9` | `2026.3.13.35` | ❌ False | **newer** (this was the bug)
|
| `""` (FastClaw error) | `2026.3.13.35` | ✅ True | unparseable →
fallback to `!=` |
| `latest` | `2026.3.13.35` | ✅ True | unparseable → fallback |

## Test plan

- [x] `pytest tests/unit/test_openclaw_version_check.py` — 27/27 passing
- [x] `ruff check + pyright` clean
- [x] `openclaw.py` at 486 lines (under 500 limit)

commit.message:
feat(ios): Stream bot replies via post_edited, handle reactions, improve connection resilience (#922)

## Summary

- **Real streaming via `post_edited`**: Replace fake typewriter
animation with real streaming from Mattermost `post_edited` WebSocket
events. New `StreamingTextAnimator` diffs incoming content and
typewriter-animates only the new suffix for a smooth UX.
- **Reaction emoji display**: Handle `reaction_added`/`reaction_removed`
WS events to show the bot's status emojis (👀🤔🔥⚡🧑‍💻👍😱🥱😨✍️) on user
messages. Supports multiple concurrent emojis during add/remove overlap.
Removes the old fake ack system.
- **Connection resilience**: Auto-retry WebSocket connect (3 attempts,
2s/4s/8s backoff) before showing error banner with Retry button. Retry
`fetchPosts` on 403 for Mattermost multi-pod membership propagation
race.
- **Push token fix**: Clear cached "last registered" token on sign-out
so re-login always re-registers the APNs device token with the new
Mattermost session.
- **Sentry improvements**: Capture real WebSocket errors (hello timeout
vs connect failure) at error level. Report MM API errors with masked
token tail and URL path for debugging.
- **Cleanup**: Remove `validateChannel` API call (403 on DM channels),
remove `recentBotMessageIds`, `MessageStatus` enum, `showAckReaction`,
`ackQueue`, and all fake ack logic.

## Test plan

- [ ] Send a message → bot reply streams in progressively (not instant
full text)
- [ ] Reaction emojis appear/disappear on user messages as bot processes
- [ ] Multiple emojis show during transition (e.g. 👀🤔 briefly before 👀
is removed)
- [ ] Sign out → sign in → push notifications still work
- [ ] Kill app → reopen → WebSocket reconnects automatically (up to 3
retries)
- [ ] If all retries fail → error banner with Retry button appears
- [ ] Tap Retry → attempts reconnection
- [ ] New user (fresh DM channel) → chat loads without 403 error

commit.message:
fix(sentry): eliminate MM connection 93K event storm — infinite loop + Logs migration (#944)

## Summary
- **Fix infinite reconnect loop**: `reconnectAttemptRef` was reset to 0
on exhaustion, allowing the last failing WS's `onclose` handler to
restart reconnect cycles forever (~6 unthrottled events per ~60s cycle)
- **Guard duplicate reconnect timers**: Prevent `scheduleReconnect` from
being called twice (from `attemptReconnect` catch + `onclose` handler
race) by checking `reconnectTimerRef`
- **Migrate MM connection reporting to Sentry Logs**: `captureMessage` →
`Sentry.logger.warn/error` — no Issues created, no event quota consumed,
still searchable in Sentry Logs tab
- **Remove unthrottled `captureSocketError`** from `websocket.ts`
`onclose` — replaced with breadcrumb (connection lifecycle already
monitored by `mattermostMonitor`)

## Root Cause
\`\`\`
WS disconnect → scheduleReconnect() → 5 attempts fail → exhaustion
detected
→ reconnectAttemptRef = 0 (reset!) → last WS onclose fires →
scheduleReconnect()
→ counter is 0 → new cycle starts → ∞ loop
\`\`\`
Each cycle: ~6 \`captureSocketError\` events (zero dedup) → 93K events
from 40 users

## Changes
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| \`useMattermost.ts\` | Add \`reconnectExhaustedRef\` to break infinite
loop; guard \`onDisconnect\`, \`scheduleReconnect\`, and
\`attemptReconnect\`; prevent duplicate timer scheduling |
| \`mattermostMonitor.ts\` | \`captureMessage\` →
\`Sentry.logger.warn/error\` with 60s dedup; restore dedup vars for
\`captureMMDataIssue\` |
| \`websocket.ts\` | \`captureSocketError()\` →
\`Sentry.addBreadcrumb()\` (zero-cost) |
| \`sentry.client.config.ts\` | Enable \`enableLogs: true\` |
| \`connectionDedup.unit.spec.ts\` | Update tests for Sentry Logs +
\`vi.resetModules()\` for proper isolation |

## Test plan
- [x] \`connectionDedup.unit.spec.ts\` — all 6 tests pass
- [x] \`networkMonitor.unit.spec.ts\` — all 7 tests pass (no regression)
- [x] \`tsc --noEmit\` — no type errors
- [x] ESLint — passes via pre-commit hook
- [ ] Deploy to staging → verify Sentry Logs appear in Logs tab (not
Issues)
- [ ] Monitor affected users — confirm event volume drops to near-zero

restart reconnect cycles forever (~6 unthrottled events per ~60s cycle)
- **Guard duplicate reconnect timers**: Prevent `scheduleReconnect` from
being called twice (from `attemptReconnect` catch + `onclose` handler
race) by checking `reconnectTimerRef`
- **Migrate MM connection reporting to Sentry Logs**: `captureMessage` →
`Sentry.logger.warn/error` — no Issues created, no event quota consumed,
still searchable in Sentry Logs tab
- **Remove unthrottled `captureSocketError`** from `websocket.ts`
`onclose` — replaced with breadcrumb (connection lifecycle already
monitored by `mattermostMonitor`)

## Root Cause
\`\`\`
WS disconnect → scheduleReconnect() → 5 attempts fail → exhaustion
detected
→ reconnectAttemptRef = 0 (reset!) → last WS onclose fires →
scheduleReconnect()
→ counter is 0 → new cycle starts → ∞ loop
\`\`\`
Each cycle: ~6 \`captureSocketError\` events (zero dedup) → 93K events
from 40 users

## Changes
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| \`useMattermost.ts\` | Add \`reconnectExhaustedRef\` to break infinite
loop; guard \`onDisconnect\`, \`scheduleReconnect\`, and
\`attemptReconnect\`; prevent duplicate timer scheduling |
| \`mattermostMonitor.ts\` | \`captureMessage\` →
\`Sentry.logger.warn/error\` with 60s dedup; restore dedup vars for
\`captureMMDataIssue\` |
| \`websocket.ts\` | \`captureSocketError()\` →
\`Sentry.addBreadcrumb()\` (zero-cost) |
| \`sentry.client.config.ts\` | Enable \`enableLogs: true\` |

\`vi.resetModules()\` for proper isolation |
